name: Banana Bread
servings: serves 12 | prep. time 10 minutes | cooking time 45-50 minutes
method: In a large mixing bowl, combine the mashed bananas, brown sugar, milk, vegetable oil, vanilla extract, and apple cider vinegar.
Stir in the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, ground cinnamon, and ground nutmeg. Mix until well-combined.
Fold in the chopped walnuts and chocolate chips.
Transfer the batter into a 13-inch loaf pan lined with parchment paper or sprayed with cooking spray.
Bake for 45-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center of the cake comes out clean.
